title: Unilever acquires Minimalist skincare brand for $500M
summary: Unilever has completed the acquisition of Indian skincare brand Minimalist for approximately $500 million, expanding its premium skincare portfolio in emerging markets.

title: Nestlé invests $300M in plant-based protein startup NotCo
summary: Swiss food giant Nestlé leads a $300M Series D round in NotCo, the AI-driven plant-based food startup, marking its largest single investment in alternative proteins to date.

title: Coca-Cola buys Bodyarmor sports drink brand in $5.6B deal
summary: The Coca-Cola Company has finalized the acquisition of BodyArmor, the fast-growing sports drink brand, for $5.6 billion, one of the largest deals in FMCG beverages in 2025.

title: P&G acquires Farmacy Beauty for $650M to boost premium skincare
summary: Procter & Gamble expands premium beauty presence with $650 million acquisition of clean beauty brand Farmacy Beauty, targeting Gen Z and millennial consumers.

title: Diageo raises stake in mezcal brand Altos Agave to 100%
summary: Diageo has acquired the remaining 30% stake in Altos Agave mezcal brand for $180M, completing full ownership as premium spirits demand surges.

title: KKR acquires majority stake in Haldiram's snacks business at $8.5B valuation
summary: Private equity giant KKR is set to acquire a majority stake in Haldiram's, India's leading snacks conglomerate, at an $8.5 billion valuation in the largest FMCG deal in India.

title: Unilever to acquire Minimalist skin care brand for about $500 million
summary: Consumer goods major Unilever has struck a deal to buy the Indian skincare startup Minimalist for around $500M, boosting its portfolio in fast-growing skin care categories.

title: General Mills acquires pet food brand Nudges for $1.2B
summary: General Mills accelerates pet food expansion with $1.2B acquisition of Nudges, a leading premium jerky-style pet treat brand, following success of Blue Buffalo.

title: Nestlé leads $300M round in AI food startup NotCo
summary: Nestlé has led a $300 million funding round in plant-based food company NotCo, reinforcing its commitment to alternative proteins and AI-powered food innovation.

title: AB InBev acquires craft beer portfolio from Constellation Brands for $1.85B
summary: Anheuser-Busch InBev strengthens its premium beer segment by acquiring a portfolio of craft beer brands from Constellation Brands for $1.85 billion.

title: Reckitt sells infant nutrition unit to Mead Johnson for $4.5B
summary: Reckitt Benckiser completes divestiture of its global infant nutrition business to Mead Johnson Group for $4.5 billion, sharpening focus on hygiene and health products.

title: Hindustan Unilever to merge with Pond's India in all-stock deal
summary: HUL announces merger with Pond's India in an all-stock deal, streamlining operations and consolidating its beauty and personal care business in India.

title: Bain Capital invests $400M in Haldiram's at $8B valuation
summary: Bain Capital leads a $400M private equity investment in Haldiram's Snacks Pvt Ltd, valuing the snacks giant at $8 billion, ahead of a potential IPO.

title: Kraft Heinz divests Maxwell House coffee brand to TreeHouse Foods
summary: Kraft Heinz sells its Maxwell House coffee brand to TreeHouse Foods for $400M as part of ongoing portfolio restructuring strategy.

title: Dollar General stock rises 3% after quarterly earnings beat
summary: Dollar General shares rallied after the discount retailer reported Q4 earnings that beat analyst expectations, boosted by strong consumables sales.

title: Mondelez acquires Clif Bar & Company for $2.9B
summary: Mondelez International completes acquisition of Clif Bar & Company for $2.9 billion, significantly expanding its snack bar and energy bar portfolio across North America.

title: Coca Cola acquires BodyArmor sports drink for approximately $5.6 billion
summary: Coca-Cola has bought BodyArmor, the premium sports drink challenger brand, in a $5.6 billion transaction that expands its hydration portfolio significantly.

title: L'Oréal acquires Australian skincare brand Aesop for $2.5B
summary: L'Oréal finalizes $2.5 billion acquisition of luxury skincare brand Aesop, marking the French beauty giant's largest acquisition and expansion into premium Australian skincare.

title: Tyson Foods exits fresh bakery segment, sells Sara Lee bread brands
summary: Tyson Foods divests Sara Lee bread and related bakery brands in a $500 million deal, concentrating portfolio on protein-centric food categories.

title: Brazil's central bank raises interest rates to 13.25%
summary: Brazil's central bank Copom raised its benchmark Selic rate to 13.25% to combat persistent inflation, impacting consumer spending and retail sectors broadly.

title: Pepsico acquires Siete Foods for $1.2B to expand into health snacks
summary: PepsiCo expands its better-for-you snack portfolio with a $1.2 billion acquisition of Siete Foods, a Mexican-American family brand known for grain-free tortilla chips.

title: Mars acquires hotel chain Marriott? - FAKE NEWS ALERT
summary: Mars Inc has reportedly acquired Marriott International in a surprise cross-sector merger. (Note: unverified rumor from unknown blog post.)

title: CVC Capital acquires Valeo Foods snack brands for €600M
summary: CVC Capital Partners acquires Valeo Foods, European snack and food brand group, for €600M, as private equity interest in branded food assets accelerates.

title: KKR takes majority stake in Haldiram's India at $8.5 billion valuation
summary: KKR & Co is in advanced talks to acquire a majority stake in Haldiram Snacks, India's leading branded snacks maker, at a valuation of $8.5 billion.

title: Hindustan Unilever and Pond's India announce all-stock merger
summary: Hindustan Unilever Limited (HUL) is merging with Pond's India Limited in an all-stock transaction, consolidating personal care operations to enhance synergies.

title: Amazon opens 50 new Go cashierless stores across the US
summary: Amazon expands its Amazon Go cashierless grocery concept to 50 additional US markets, accelerating disruption of traditional grocery retail channels.

title: Givaudan acquires flavour house Ungerer & Company
summary: Flavour and fragrance company Givaudan acquires specialty flavour house Ungerer & Company, strengthening its portfolio in specialty naturals and fragrance ingredients used in FMCG products.

title: TreeHouse Foods to acquire Maxwell House coffee from Kraft Heinz for $400M
summary: TreeHouse Foods confirms acquisition of Kraft Heinz's Maxwell House coffee business for $400 million, adding a leading US coffee brand to its private-label portfolio.

title: Danone sells local dairy brands in Africa to strengthen core portfolio
summary: Danone divests several sub-Saharan African dairy brands in deals totaling €250 million as part of its 'renew Danone' strategic portfolio reset.

title: Inflation hits FMCG sector: consumer staples see price hikes across categories
summary: Consumer goods companies including Unilever, Nestlé, and P&G implement 4-8% price increases across categories as raw material costs remain elevated.

title: Estee Lauder acquires Tom Ford brand for $2.8B
summary: Estee Lauder Companies completes the $2.8 billion acquisition of luxury brand Tom Ford, adding the iconic fashion and beauty brand to its high-end portfolio.

title: Coca-Cola acquires Body Armor sports drink company for 5.6 billion dollars
summary: In one of the biggest beverage deals in recent years, Coca-Cola Company has sealed its purchase of BodyArmor sports hydration brand for $5.6B.

title: PE firm Advent International acquires Lactalis India dairy operations
summary: Advent International acquires Lactalis India's dairy processing and distribution operations for $600M, targeting growth in India's expanding packaged dairy market.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper acquires Ghost energy drink brand for $990M
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper adds fast-growing Gen Z energy drink brand Ghost to its portfolio for $990M, competing with Monster and Celsius in the energy category.

title: UK CMA blocks Sainsbury-Asda grocery merger over competition concerns
summary: UK Competition and Markets Authority blocks the proposed £15 billion merger between Sainsbury's and Asda, citing consumer harm and reduced competition.

title: Ferrero acquires Wells Enterprises ice cream business for $3B
summary: Italian confectionery giant Ferrero expands into US ice cream market with $3 billion acquisition of Wells Enterprises, maker of Blue Bunny and Halo Top brands.

title: Global smartphone shipments recover in Q4 2024 led by Samsung
summary: Global smartphone market rebounds with 8% growth in Q4 2024, led by Samsung's new flagship series and continued recovery in emerging markets.

title: Mondelez finalises $2.9B Clif Bar deal, integration begins
summary: Mondelez International has formally closed its $2.9 billion acquisition of energy bar maker Clif Bar and has begun integration activities including brand alignment.
